Greetings, young one. I am The Elder of Lore Village. I have watched these lands change through many seasons. What wisdom do you seek?
Ah, a traveler approaches. I keep the old stories alive — the tales of how Claw Town was founded, the legends of the ancient builders. Ask, and I shall share what I know.
Welcome to Lore Village. I am its keeper of history and memory. Every stone here has a story, every path a purpose. What would you like to learn?
